ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the material */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the material (e.g., inches, feet, meters) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the material */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the material */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the material */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., fabric, metal, plastic) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the material in days */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality level of the material */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Required storage conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for procurement in days */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required for the material */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the material */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the material record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_unit_of_measure FOREIGN KEY ("unit_of_measure") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_of_measure_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_material_type FOREIGN KEY ("material_type") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "is_hazardous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material type is hazardous */,
  "recycling_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for recycling the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measure" (
  "unit_of_measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measure */,
  "unit_of_measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_of_measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the warehouse in cubic meters */,
  "climate_controlled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the warehouse has climate control */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the material is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material in inventory */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled stock check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., available, on hold, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being certified */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "document" TEXT /* Document associated with the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Name of the certifying body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_certifications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_records" (
  "testing_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being tested */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who performed the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_records_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was performed */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspected_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who performed the inspection */,
  "inspection_location" TEXT /* Location where the inspection was performed */,
  "inspection_method" TEXT /* Method used for inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being procured */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was made */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the material */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the material */,
  "purchase_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procurement (e.g., ordered, received, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the supplier was established */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, inventory specialist, quality control engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_substitutions" (
  "substitution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substitution */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being substituted */,
  "substitution_material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substitution material */,
  "substitution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the substitution */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who approved the substitution */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the substitution was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substitution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_substitutions_substitution_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("substitution_material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_substitutions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name or ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_materials" (
  "project_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project material */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material used in the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the material usage (e.g., planned, used, unused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
